summary.text: [0-6] A static black screen displays the title "胸腔引流 更換流程" in large white text, with a watermark "使用威力導演編輯" at the bottom right. [6-14] The scene transitions to a person in blue scrubs at a counter against a blue wall with two clear bottles. An instruction "先將外包裝袋拿掉" appears as the person manipulates a tall white plastic package, pulling apart the top layers to remove the outer packaging bag.

[14-16] Hands in blue sleeves manipulate a tall white plastic package on a counter, peeling back outer wrapping layers. Two clear bottles stand against a blue wall. The text "先將外包裝袋拿掉" is displayed.
[16-20] A clear plastic drainage bag with blue markings is lifted from the white wrapper and set upright on the counter to the right.
[20-28] Hands grasp the sides and top of the tall white package, pulling layers upwards to separate them. The clear cylindrical container remains stationary on the right while the instructional text persists.

[28-34] Hands in blue sleeves pull white plastic wrapping off a second clear cylindrical container with a white lid, revealing it fully and placing it next to an identical stationary container on the counter. The text "先將外包裝袋拿掉" is visible at the bottom. [34-42] The subtitle updates to "剪掉蓋子 預防不小心蓋住". Hands holding black scissors enter the frame and begin cutting the white plastic lid structure on the left container. The blades snip the top section to prevent accidental covering while the right container remains untouched.

From [42-46], hands in blue sleeves use black scissors to cut the white plastic lid of the right clear container, while the left container sits stationary with a modified lid; the text "剪掉蓋子 預防不小心蓋住" is displayed. From [46-58], the text changes to "用布膠黏在 300ml處(橫) 及刻度處(直)". The hands hold a roll of white cloth tape and black scissors, cutting a strip of tape. Two clear cylindrical containers with white lids remain stationary on the counter in the background alongside small bottles. The hands manipulate the cut tape strip and scissors over the counter surface, preparing for the next step.

[58-68] Hands in blue sleeves actively use black scissors to cut a strip of white cloth tape from a roll held over the counter surface. Two clear cylindrical containers with white lids stand stationary in the background near small plastic bottles against a blue wall. The overlay text "用布膠黏在 300ml處(橫) 及刻度處(直)" persists at the bottom of the screen. [68-72] The cutting action ceases as the hands position and press the strip of white cloth tape against the side of the left clear cylindrical container. The left hand continues to hold the black scissors while positioning the tape. The right container remains stationary on the counter. The instructional text overlay remains visible throughout the sequence.

[72-86] Hands in blue sleeves apply white cloth tape to the side of the left clear cylindrical container. The left hand holds the tape roll while the right hand presses and smooths the tape strip firmly against the plastic surface near the base. Black scissors lie stationary on the counter surface to the right. Throughout the sequence, the instructional text overlay "用布膠黏在 300ml處(橫) 及刻度處(直)" remains visible at the bottom, guiding the placement at the 300ml mark.

[86-98] Hands in blue sleeves continue pressing and smoothing white cloth tape onto the side of the left clear cylindrical container. The left hand holds the tape roll while the right hand secures the strip against the plastic surface, working near the base and along the vertical scale. A pair of black scissors lies stationary on the counter to the right throughout the sequence. The instructional text overlay "用布膠黏在 300ml處(橫) 及刻度處(直)" remains visible at the bottom, guiding the user to tape at the 300ml mark horizontally and at the刻度 (scale) vertically. The hands adjust their grip to ensure the tape adheres firmly to the container.

[98-108] Hands in blue sleeves apply and smooth a vertical strip of white cloth tape onto the side of a left clear container, carefully aligning it with the measurement scale markings. The left hand stabilizes the container or holds the tape roll while the right hand presses down firmly to secure the tape. Black scissors lie stationary on the counter surface to the right. The white Chinese instructional text "用布膠黏在 300ml處(橫) 及刻度處(直)" persists at the bottom of the screen. [108-110] The left hand moves to grasp the lid of a middle clear cylinder situated behind the front container, adjusting the setup, while the right hand remains near the taped container.

[110-118] Hands in blue sleeves adjust the setup; the left hand holds the white lid and tubing of the middle clear cylinder, while the right hand rests near the base of the front-left container. Black scissors lie stationary on the counter right. [118-124] The left hand moves from the middle container to touch small clear bottles on the left counter edge, then returns to the lid. The right hand stabilizes the front container. The instructional text overlay "用布膠黏在 300ml處(橫) 及刻度處(直)" persists at the bottom.

[126-138] Hands in blue sleeves actively adjust a medical setup on a counter. The left hand transitions from grasping the white lid and tubing of a middle clear cylinder to reaching for small clear bottles on the far left, before returning to grip the side of the front container near a white tape strip. The right hand remains near the base of the front clear container, providing stability. Black scissors lie stationary on the right counter. A white instructional text overlay persists at the bottom, reading "用布膠黏在 300ml處(橫) 及刻度處(直)".

[140-146] A person wearing a green surgical cap, mask, and blue scrubs leans over a white counter, adjusting a medical setup. Their hands manipulate the white lid assemblies of rear and middle clear cylinders while stabilizing the front container base. Black scissors remain stationary on the counter right. The instructional text "用布膠黏在 300ml處(橫) 及刻度處(直)" persists at the bottom.
[146-150] The on-screen text changes to "打開蓋子 倒入D/W 300ml". Hands move to the left side to pick up a small clear bottle filled with liquid. The left hand twists the cap to open it. Black scissors remain stationary on the white surface right, while large clear containers stand upright in the background.

[162-170] Hands in blue sleeves hold a small clear bottle inverted over a large cylindrical container, pouring liquid inside. The instructional text "打開蓋子 倒入D/W 300ml" remains at the bottom. Black scissors lie stationary on the white counter to the right, near another similar container. Other medical supplies sit in the background against a blue wall. The liquid stream is visible entering the container as the pouring continues. From 170-178s, hands in blue sleeves interact with a small clear bottle and a large cylindrical container. Initially [170-172], the bottle is inverted to pour liquid, accompanied by the persistent text "打開蓋子 倒入D/W 300ml". From [178-186], hands in blue sleeves hold a small clear bottle inverted over a large cylindrical container, steadily pouring liquid inside. The white text "打開蓋子 倒入D/W 300ml" remains visible at the bottom. Black scissors sit stationary on the white counter to the right, near a second container. The liquid transfer continues consistently as the person maintains the pouring action, ensuring fluid flows from the small bottle into the larger vessel.

From 186s to 194s, hands in blue sleeves hold a small clear bottle inverted over a large cylindrical container, continuing a steady liquid pour. The white text overlay '打開蓋子 倒入D/W 300ml' remains visible at the bottom. Black scissors stay stationary on the counter to the right. [194-202] Hands in blue sleeves hold a small clear bottle inverted over a large cylindrical container, maintaining a steady pour of liquid throughout the interval. The white text overlay '打開蓋子 倒入D/W 300ml' remains fixed at the bottom, instructing the action. Black scissors lie stationary on the white counter to the right, near the base of the container. An instruction "先將外包裝袋拿掉" appears as the person manipulates a tall white plastic package, pulling apart the top layers to remove the outer packaging bag. [14-16] Hands in blue sleeves manipulate a tall white plastic package on a counter, peeling back outer wrapping layers. Two clear bottles stand against a blue wall. The text "先將外包裝袋拿掉" is displayed. [16-20] A clear plastic drainage bag with blue markings is lifted from the white wrapper and set upright on the counter to the right. [20-28] Hands grasp the sides and top of the tall white package, pulling layers upwards to separate them. The clear cylindrical container remains stationary on the right while the instructional text persists. [28-34] Hands in blue sleeves pull white plastic wrapping off a second clear cylindrical container with a white lid, revealing it fully and placing it next to an identical stationary container on the counter. The text "先將外包裝袋拿掉" is visible at the bottom. [34-42] The subtitle

From 202s to 210s, hands wearing blue sleeves hold a small clear bottle in an inverted position over a large cylindrical container, steadily pouring liquid inside. The white text overlay "打開蓋子 倒入D/W 300ml" remains fixed at the bottom of the screen. On the white counter to the right, a pair of black scissors sits stationary while the fluid transfer continues uninterrupted. The action represents a consistent pouring process within a laboratory setting, with the liquid level in the cylinder gradually increasing as the small bottle is emptied.

Between 210s and 218s, hands in blue sleeves hold a small clear bottle inverted over a large graduated cylinder, continuing to pour liquid steadily into the container. The white instructional text "打開蓋子 倒入D/W 300ml" remains fixed at the bottom of the view. Black scissors lie stationary on the white counter to the right. As the fluid transfer proceeds, the liquid level within the cylinder rises. The person maintains the pouring position consistently while the text overlay persists.

[218-220] The scene cuts to a black screen displaying white instructions: "用奇異筆寫上 D/W 300ml".
[220-226] The view returns to the lab where hands in blue sleeves hold a clear cylindrical container. The overlay text "用奇異筆寫上 D/W 300ml" persists at the bottom. The right hand uses a black marker to write "D/W 300ml" on a white label attached to the container, while the left hand stabilizes it. Black scissors rest on the counter to the right. In the background, clear bottles stand against a blue wall. The writing progresses from "D/W" to the full "300ml" measurement, completing the labeling step.

[226-234] Hands in blue sleeves hold a clear cylindrical container steady on a beige counter. The right hand uses a black marker to write on the attached vertical white label, completing the handwritten text 'D/W 300ml'. The left hand stabilizes the vessel throughout the process. A pair of black scissors rests stationary on the counter surface to the right. Several clear plastic bottles stand in the background against a blue wall partition. A white instructional text overlay remains visible at the bottom of the screen, reading '用奇異筆寫上 D/W 300ml'. The right hand lowers the marker away from the label after finishing the writing task.
